The SOTA in AI Engineering
All in One Place

10 parallel engineering miniconferences + 2 leadership tracks. 400+ sessions. Divide
and conquer!

Orientation Jun 28   Workshop Day Jun 29   Tuesday Jun 30   Wednesday Jul 1   Thursday Jul 2

#1 Harness Engineering   #2 Generative Media
#3 Agentic Commerce   #4 AI in Finance
#5 Local AI   #6 Graphs   #7 AI in GTM
#8 AI in Healthcare   #9 Agentic Engineering
#10 Inference   #11 AI-Native Enterprises

AI in Finance
Inside the agentic shift in quant finance -- from Morgan Stanley's autonomous research agents to Nubank vetting 2,000 AI skills, with Intuit, Fidelity, and Anthropic wrestling through what it really takes to ship finance agents that understand money

accepted.text: AI Engineer Token Billionaires
accepted.ocr_reason: Simple mockup-style slide with large readable title; direct read is enough.

accepted.text:
Thematic
Focuses

For

AI Leadership

AI Architects: Show my Workflow
Watch AI architects from Qodo, Docker, and Hugging Face
open up their real production stacks-agent runtimes, eval
pipelines, and code review you can actually trust-while
engineers from The Browser Company show how they
automate their own jobs end-to-end.

AI Architects: Tokenmaxxing
When tokens become the new lines of code, the metrics
change too. Microsoft, Jellyfish, and Arize AI weigh in on
agents refactoring real codebases, the death of the code
review, and whether engineers should still read code at all.

AI Architects: AI Factories
How production AI systems actually get built-and paid for:
token-spend FinOps and agent budgets from Microsoft and
Anthropic, model routing across teams, and the infrastructure
layer where Venrock argues the AI race is really won or lost.
accepted.ocr_reason: Multi-column slide with small body text in dark panels.

accepted.text:
Sessions for Leadership track

1 Tokenomics (60 Mins)
- Spend is Scaling Faster Than Value Realization
  - Tokenmaxing/ Rapid Growth of AI Token Spend
  - Lack of Visibility and Control
- Non-Decision-Grade Economics due to unclear cost and value dynamics and challenges in measuring AI benefits
- Shift from Token-Level to Workflow-Level Analysis

Participant profile
20-30 senior leaders:
- CEO, Presidents
- Product and Engineering heads (CIO, CTO, Head of R&D)
- Finance heads (CFO)

2 Agentic org of the future (60 mins)
- The shift towards newer, smaller team structure
- Implications on roles and responsibilities
  - At a team level
  - At the overall org level
- Challenges that need to be solved to ensure success:
  - HR processes, performance management, hiring, recruiting
  - Change management
  - Upskilling

Participant profile
20-30 senior leaders:
- CEO, Presidents
- Product and Engineering heads (CIO, CTO, Head of R&D)
- CHROs, Head of HR functions

Proposed format:
- Martin (or other partner) shares initial thoughts and content on the topic (15 min)
- Open for discussion and Q&A (45 mins)

Proposed timing - pls confirm:
- Tokenomics - 1-2 PM PT on July 1st
- Agentic org of the future - 3-4 PM PT on July 1st

accepted.text:
Forward Deployed Engineering
How forward deployed engineers actually operate inside
Anthropic, Ramp, Cursor, and Sierra — embedding with
customers, wiring up custom integrations, debugging
production systems, and learning hard lessons like how to
stop shipping low-quality RL environments.

AI in Finance
Inside the agentic shift in quant finance — from Morgan
Stanley's autonomous research agents to Nubank vetting
2,000 AI skills, with Intuit, Fidelity, and Anthropic wrestling
through what it really takes to ship finance agents that
understand money.

AI in Healthcare
From ambient clinical documentation at Abridge to multi-
agent care at Sword Health, voice at scale from Hippocratic
AI, and Google DeepMind's AMIE co-clinician — this track is
about shipping patient-facing health AI with the guardrails
and regulatory rigor it demands.

Sponsorship Prospectus
1.5 million

October 12 -14,2026

ocr_reconcile.text:
Forward Deployed Engineering
How forward deployed engineers actually operate inside
Anthropic, Ramp, Cursor, and Sierra — embedding with
customers, wiring up custom integrations, debugging
production systems, and learning hard lessons like how to
stop shipping low-quality RL environments.

AI in Finance
Inside the agentic shift in quant finance — from Morgan
Stanley's autonomous research agents to Nubank vetting
2,000 AI skills, with Intuit, Fidelity, and Anthropic wrestling
through what it really takes to ship finance agents that
understand money.

AI in Healthcare
From ambient clinical documentation at Abridge to multi-
agent care at Sword Health, voice at scale from Hippocratic
AI, and Google DeepMind's AMIE co-clinician — this track is
about shipping patient-facing health AI with the guardrails
and regulatory rigor it demands.

accepted.text:
AI Engineer World's Fair – New Engineer Orientation (IRL)
Sunday, June 28
5:00 PM - 9:00 PM
Moscone West
San Francisco, CA
One-Click RSVP

If you're coming to AIE for the first time, it can be a lot to take in if you're confused about anything about our program or how to make the most out of the week, join this to ask directly and meet new friends and speakers early.

THIS IS THE LAST ONE WE'LL RUN, RIGHT BEFORE THE SHOW ITSELF.
COME EARLY TO PICK UP BADGES AND ESCAPE THE MORNING CRUSH.

Some notes:
- If you are traveling in, we REALLY REALLY advise booking the hotel NOW, or discounts expire Jun 4 and they will sell out.
- we are announcing speakers in waves
- we'll do a few of these orientation talks leading up to it, and on Jun 28 (Sunday before AIEWF) we'll do an IRL in person.
